mapper.select: SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID , S.PROGRAM_ID , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , S.TOTAL_SEATS , S.AVAIL_SEATS , S.STATUS , S.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE S.SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}

SELECT S.SCHEDULE_ID , S.PROGRAM_ID , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , S.TOTAL_SEATS , S.AVAIL_SEATS , S.STATUS , S.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE S.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND S.STATUS = 'OPEN' ORDER BY S.EVENT_DATE ASC, S.EVENT_TIME ASC
